Table of Contents

Interface IClassifyGEN

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control classification.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CBA26148-CD2C-44AC-BBF5-B228B55A198D")]
public interface IClassifyGEN

Properties

ClassBreaks

The array of class breaks (double). ClassBreaks(0) is the minimum value in the dataset, and subsequent breaks represent the upper limit of each class.

object ClassBreaks { get; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassID

The CLSID for the classification object.

UID ClassID { get; }

Property Value

UID

Examples

Sample Snippet

MethodName

The name of the classification method (based on choice of classification object).

string MethodName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Classify(object, object, ref int)

Classifies histogram data (array of values (doubles) and a paired array of frequencies (longs)) into the specified number of classes.

void Classify(object doubleArrayValues, object longArrayFrequencies, ref int numClasses)

Parameters

doubleArrayValues object
longArrayFrequencies object
numClasses int

Examples

Sample Snippet
